reference: I am suffering from rheumatoid arthritis and planning for a second pregnancy. I am thirty-one years old and I have polycystic ovarian disease. My doctor told me that it is safe to take sulfasalazine five hundred during pregnancy. I want to know how safe sulfasalazine is during pregnancy and what the side effects are.
text: I am suffering from rheumatoid arthritis and planning for a second pregnancy. I am 31 years old, and I have polycystic ovarian disease. My doctor told me that it is safe to take sulfasalazine 500 during pregnancy. I want to know how safe sulfasalazine is during pregnancy, and what the side effects are.
